title: Cursor Orchestrator
description: A Node 20+ CLI (`cursor-orch`) that spins up Cursor Cloud Agents across GitHub repos using a bootstrap repo and per-run branches as the coordination surface—documented end-to-end in the repository README.

title: Cursor Sync
description: VS Code/Cursor extension that syncs user-level Cursor settings and `~/.cursor` paths to a private GitHub Gist—manual or scheduled—with conflict resolution and optional agent transcript export/import per README and `package.json`.

title: Tangerina
description: Python Discord bot with pluggable AI providers (Zhipu, OpenAI, Gemini), function-calling for music, voice, and Discord actions, plus a Flask REST API on port 5000—see `README.md` and `features/` in the repository.

title: Agentic Browser AI
description: TypeScript MCP server using Puppeteer and Express: browser sessions, navigation, screenshots, and related tooling wired for Cursor via MCP and optional SSE/hybrid scripts (`package.json`, `README.md`).
